specific_question: Of all the cyber threats committed against Elexion Automotive in 2025, what percentage of them were attempted email phishing attacks against Elexion Automotive employees?
answer: About 21% of all cyber threats committed against Elexion Automotive in 2025 fell into the category of email phishing attempts against the company's employees.
dr_question: In response to the April 2025 Help Net Security article, how well is Elexion Automotive poised to adapt and take proactive measures to prevent itself and its consumer base from the latest cybersecurity threats as we approach 2026?
